definition: CLO reinvestment period expirations concentrate in 2025-2027, coinciding with the maturity wall. If overcollateralization tests fail, forced selling of performing credits could amplify fundamental credit deterioration. Estimated threshold of 600-700bp HY OAS, though imprecise.
evidence: CLO reinvestment period expirations concentrate in 2025-2027
OC test failure mechanism is real and absent from all other analyses
600-700bp HY OAS threshold estimated but imprecise
open_questions: What is the precise OC test failure threshold?
What is the aggregate exposure from simultaneously expiring reinvestment periods?
How would forced selling interact with covenant-lite step-function defaults?
